title: 56× 36 inches Extra Large Birthday Gift Bag with Ribbon, Tag & Card, Jumbo Plastic Gift Bag for Big Presents(Blue)
features: Extra Large Size for Big Surprises: Measuring 36× 56 inches, this oversized gift bag is perfect for wrapping large or bulky birthday gifts such as plush toys, bedding, clothing sets, or home items.
Festive Birthday Elements Design: Features a vibrant, cheerful birthday-themed print filled with balloons, confetti, and birthday cake that instantly brighten any celebration.
Complete Gift Set: Comes with a ribbon, a matching gift tag, and a birthday card—everything you need to present a beautiful and thoughtful gift in one package.
Durable and Tear-Resistant: Made from high-quality, thick plastic material to securely hold heavier or awkwardly shaped gifts without tearing or sagging.
Perfect for All Ages: Whether for kids, teens, or adults, this fun and eye-catching birthday gift bag adds excitement and charm to any birthday surprise.
